title: My Weekend
text: My name is Lina. I like weekends because I can relax.
On Saturday, I wake up late and have breakfast with my family.
In the afternoon, I go out with my friends.
On Sunday, I stay at home and do my homework.
Weekends help me feel happy and ready for the new week.

questions.question: What does Lina do on Saturday morning?
options: She wakes up late and has breakfast
questions.correctAnswer: She wakes up late and has breakfast

questions.question: Who does Lina go out with?
What does Lina do on Sunday?
options: She stays at home and does homework
questions.correctAnswer: She stays at home and does homework
